---
title: "A Working Series on the ICS Interest Rate Model"
subtitle: "Six articles, from regulatory text to capital charge"
author: "Kelvin Wong"
date: "2026-05-18"
categories: [yield-curves, solvency, dns, taiwan, series]
image: thumbnail.jpg
description: "A six-article working series on the IAIS Insurance Capital Standard's interest rate risk model and its Taiwan implementation, from regulatory text to capital charge."
listing:
  contents: 
    - "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "order asc"
  type: default
  fields: [order, title, subtitle, date, reading-time]
  field-display-names:
    order: "#"
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  id: series-articles
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

A six-article working series on the IAIS Insurance Capital Standard's interest rate risk model and its Taiwan implementation. Start with **Article 0** for the series scope and disclaimers, or jump to any article below.

::: {#series-articles}
:::

---

*Comments and corrections welcome.*
